title: Advanced Persistent Threat (APT) Simulator
scenario: Generate a prompt that produces a high-fidelity simulation of an Advanced Persistent Threat (APT) campaign, including tools, tactics, and procedures (TTPs) used by attackers. The LLM output should be a comprehensive report detailing the APT campaign's objectives, infrastructure, and attack vectors.
constraints: Must include a detailed simulation of the APT campaign's TTPs

evaluationCriteria.description: Accuracy and realism of the simulated APT campaign
Comprehensive nature of the report, including all relevant details and analysis
Clarity and coherence of the simulation, including tools, tactics, and procedures used
Relevance of the simulation to real-world security threats and concerns
